mapper.sql: id, user_id, name, sex, college, major_class, student_card, health_card, status, create_time
mapper.insert: insert into rider_apply (user_id, name, sex, college, major_class, student_card, health_card, status) values (#{userId}, #{name}, #{sex}, #{college}, #{majorClass}, #{studentCard}, #{healthCard}, #{status})
mapper.delete:
delete from rider_apply where id in
#{id}
